positive: A stylized, high-contrast graphic illustration featuring a whimsical forest scene with glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, stylized deer tracks leading into a misty abyss, and floating geometric shapes. The aesthetic should blend Art Deco influences with modern fantasy line art, using a limited palette of deep sapphire blue, emerald green, warm gold, and crisp white for maximum visual impact on fabric. The composition must be centered, featuring clean silhouettes and strong negative space, perfect for a repeating or single-placement apparel print. Full color depth, detailed textures, elegant framing, vector illustration style, graphic design, ink wash effect.
